auditAreas.summary: Main and preload builds use electron-vite with externalized dependencies; renderer aliases are configured.
electron-builder is installed and postinstall runs install-app-deps, but no explicit Windows/macOS build config is present.
No asar/unpack policy is declared for native dependencies, ai-service resources, or extension assets.
better-sqlite3 and sharp are native dependencies and require unpack/rebuild validation in later phases.
Two preload entry points are configured: src/preload/index.ts and src/preload/browser.ts.
No packaging resource policy is declared for ai-service, Python worker files, or future runtime packages.
No NSIS/DMG, x64/arm64, signing, notarization, or release target policy is currently declared.

nextPhase: 9B should add minimal pack/dist scripts without signing, notarization, or publishing.
